title: AI Frontier vs Open Source: The Gap is CLOSING FAST! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that open-source AI models are closing the performance gap with frontier models at an accelerating rate, with the timeline shrinking from annual to monthly intervals. The video reflects on the rapid pace of AI innovation in reducing the advantage held by closed proprietary systems.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that open-source AI models are closing the performance gap with frontier proprietary systems, and that the lag between the two is shrinking from annual to monthly intervals. The takeaway is that model convergence is accelerating, compressing the window during which closed foundation models hold a clear advantage.
